g.text: These envelope fields are omitted here for clarity except
where transactionId is contextually relevant, e.g., the
periodic meter value events in the charge/discharge loops.

Q01.FR.02 SHALL: include EVCCID in idToken.additionalInfo
for ISO 15118-20 transactions. EVCCID is learned from
SessionSetupReq below; in practice CS may delay this
or use a cached EVCCID for vehicles previously seen at
defaults to charging only -- must be
present for CS to offer BPT services.

discharge parameters MUST use NEGATIVE values,
charge parameters MUST use POSITIVE values.
(Applies to all DC BPT control mode messages.)
DC_ChargeParameterDiscoveryRes is a single round-trip per
ISO 15118-20 §8.3.4.5.2.3 / Table 59. The Res contains only
there is NO EVSEProcessing field. The CSMS-side profile
computation runs during the ScheduleExchange wait band per
Schedule Exchange and CSMS Setpoint Negotiation (Dynamic Mode)
V2X energy bounds for BPT negotiation.
Per K19.FR.01, the ScheduleExchangeReq for Dynamic mode
is the trigger for NotifyEVChargingNeedsRequest (NOT the
preceding ChargeParameterDiscoveryReq, which is a pure
EV/EVSE round-trip). Per Q01 Remarks (and Q01.FR.09
default-mode rule), a strict implementation first requests
after CSMS confirms BPT in allowedEnergyTransfer.
for an ISO 15118-20 transaction (BPT or unidirectional)

and is therefore omitted; v2xChargingParameters is the

unidirectional and does not use setpoint.

capping rules apply only to ExternalSetpoint.
negative prices represent export earnings (EV to grid).
PriceLevelSchedule is an alternative for simpler
implementations but cannot express bidirectional pricing.

[V2G20-1434] SHALL: once the precharge process is finished,
the EVCC sends DC_PreChargeReq with EVProcessing=Finished.
This transition gates the next allowed message (PowerDeliveryReq)
EVSE adjusts output voltage to match EV battery voltage

(this diagram), it is optional and omitted.

Direction change is implicit via negative setpoint.
CSMS already knows -- it initiated the switch.

in progress, then sends Finished per [V2G20-1461].
The Finished transition gates the next allowed
